item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh, this is solid. Subtle, creepy, supremely unnerving. It's a small incident in the scheme of things, but it's super weird. In the best way possible, it gives me early-00's short creepypasta vibes. Hearty +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: +1 from me. This is what I've really hoped to see skips return to: shortish, thought provoking, and weird as all get out. I like the use of the esoteric object class, it takes guts to use it, and it certainly advances the plot. Great job.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Written for day three of the 2019 JamCon; theme was "So it was all a dream…". Thanks to weryllium, 9Volt, Ayers, and the couple of other people who gave it a once-over.

Image is from https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:River_Mountain_Water_Treatment_Facility,_Henderson,_Nevada_(18193511142).jpg, licensed under CC-BY-SA-2.0.
